title: Poorvika Mobiles is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Poorvika Mobiles is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!
